title: quercus dunnii
intro: Quercus dunnii, also known as the Dunn Oak or Chinese Evergreen Oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to China. The medicinal properties of Quercus dunnii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Quercus dunnii include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Quercus dunnii can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
